programme.title: Criminal Minds
programme.sub-title: Mr. Scratch

programme.title: Criminal Minds

programme.title: Criminal Minds
programme.sub-title: The Hunt
programme.desc: The team suspects Kate's niece and her friend were kidnapped by an online predator involved in sex trafficking and race to find them before they are hurt.

programme.title: Criminal Minds
programme.sub-title: The Job
programme.desc: The BAU interviews candidates to take the opening left by Kate's departure; the team tracks a serial killer who leaves behind evidence that indicates a person intent on revenge.

programme.title: Criminal Minds
programme.sub-title: The Witness
programme.desc: The team must find the person responsible for a sarin gas attack on a Los Angeles bus before a larger incident occurs.

programme.title: Criminal Minds
programme.sub-title: 'Til Death Do Us Part
programme.desc: The team suspects a jilted unknown subject is responsible when brides are murdered on the eve of their nuptials.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.sub-title: Slow Burn

programme.title: CSI: Miami

programme.title: CSI: Miami

programme.desc: A former surf champion is murdered in his home, while his wife and son are left beaten and bound.

programme.title: CSI: Miami

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.sub-title: Wannabe

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.sub-title: Deadline

programme.title: CSI: Miami

programme.title: CSI: Miami

programme.title: CSI: Miami

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.sub-title: MIA/NYC - NonStop
programme.desc: Horatio goes to New York to work with his counterparts on a murder investigation. Guest star Gary Sinise.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.sub-title: Innocent

programme.sub-title: Lost Son

programme.sub-title: The Male in the Mail

programme.title: Bones
programme.sub-title: The Crack in the Code

programme.title: Bones
programme.sub-title: The Prisoner in the Pipe

programme.title: Bones
programme.sub-title: The Bump in the Road

programme.title: Bones
programme.sub-title: The Don't in the Do

programme.title: Bones
programme.sub-title: The Warrior in the Wuss

programme.title: Bones
programme.sub-title: The Suit on the Set

programme.title: The Listener
programme.sub-title: Some Kinda Love

programme.title: The Listener
programme.sub-title: Lisa Says
programme.desc: When Toby saves a troubled teen from a gang beating, he stumbles upon a hidden group of runaways.

programme.title: The Listener
programme.sub-title: Foggy Notion

programme.title: The Listener

programme.sub-title: K9 + Smugglers + New Recruit

programme.sub-title: Lidar + Rogues + Duty

programme.title: Banana Joe

programme.title: Lone Wolf and Cub: Baby Cart to Hades
programme.desc: In a rare moment of compassion, Lone Wolf rescues a girl who has killed a pimp in self-defense. By his code, he is forced to endure being tortured to within an inch of his life. Lone Wolf takes to the road again, where his expertise is very much in demand, so much so that a would-be employer had already had a contract placed on him. The slayer with the baby cart proceeds down bloodstained paths to Hades.

programme.title: Nine Deaths of the Ninja
programme.desc: A group of drug runners/freedom fighters has kidnapped a busload of tourists in the Philippines and is threatening to kill them all if one of their partners is not released from prison and the government doesn't halt its anti-drug policies. To stop the criminals, a trio of specialist soldiers are called in. Even with all their training, will they be able to stop the terrorists when they begin killing hostages and turning loose their squads of attack midgets?

programme.title: Charlie Countryman
programme.desc: A young American falls hard for a Romanian cellist whose father has recently died -- and whose violent past could bring about his own demise.

programme.title: Ali
programme.desc: In 1964, a brash, new pro boxer, fresh from his Olympic gold medal victory, explodes onto the scene: Cassius Clay. Bold and outspoken, he cuts an entirely new image for African Americans in sport with his proud public self-confidence and his unapologetic belief that he is the greatest boxer of all time. Yet at the top of his game, both Ali's personal and professional lives face the ultimate test.

programme.title: Stand Up Guys
programme.desc: After serving 28 years in prison for accidentally killing the son of a crime boss, newly paroled gangster Val reunites with his former partners in crime, Doc and Hirsch, for a night on the town. As the three men revisit old haunts, reflect on their glory days and try to make up for lost time, one wrestles with a terrible quandary: Doc has orders to kill Val, and time is running out for him to figure out a way out of his dilemma.

programme.title: The Aviator
programme.desc: A biopic depicting the life of filmmaker and aviation pioneer Howard Hughes from 1927 to 1947, during which time he became a successful film producer and an aviation magnate, while simultaneously growing more unstable due to severe obsessive-compulsive disorder.

programme.title: Elvis
programme.desc: The life story of Elvis Presley as seen through the complicated relationship with his enigmatic manager, Colonel Tom Parker.

programme.title: Passengers
programme.desc: A spacecraft traveling to a distant colony planet and transporting thousands of people has a malfunction in its sleep chambers. As a result, two passengers are awakened 90 years early.

programme.title: The Pursuit Of Happyness
programme.desc: A struggling salesman takes custody of his son as he's poised to begin a life-changing professional career.

programme.title: Southpaw
programme.desc: Billy "The Great" Hope, the reigning junior middleweight boxing champion, has an impressive career, a loving wife and daughter, and a lavish lifestyle. However, when tragedy strikes, Billy hits rock bottom, losing his family, his house and his manager. He soon finds an unlikely savior in Tick Willis, a former fighter who trains the city's toughest amateur boxers. With his future on the line, Hope fights to reclaim the trust of those he loves the most.

programme.title: The Pianist
programme.desc: The true story of pianist Wladyslaw Szpilman's experiences in Warsaw during the Nazi occupation. When the Jews of the city find themselves forced into a ghetto, Szpilman finds work playing in a café; and when his family is deported in 1942, he stays behind, works for a while as a laborer, and eventually goes into hiding in the ruins of the war-torn city.

programme.title: Boychoir
programme.desc: A troubled and angry 11-year-old orphan from a small Texas town, ends up at a Boy Choir school after the death of his single mother. Completely out of his element, he finds himself in a battle of wills with a demanding Choir Master who recognises a unique talent in this young boy as he pushes him to discover his creative heart and soul in music.

programme.title: The Love Laugh Live Show
programme.desc: A prominent Indian anchor interviews famous celebrities and brings out their fun side by talking about their life and love stories. India 2019.

programme.title: I Am Wrath
programme.desc: A man is out for justice after a group of corrupt police officers are unable to catch his wife's killer.

programme.title: The Hunger Games: Catching Fire
programme.desc: Katniss Everdeen has returned home safe after winning the 74th Annual Hunger Games along with fellow tribute Peeta Mellark. Winning means that they must turn around and leave their family and close friends, embarking on a "Victor's Tour" of the districts. Along the way Katniss senses that a rebellion is simmering, but the Capitol is still very much in control as President Snow prepares the 75th Annual Hunger Games (The Quarter Quell) - a competition that could change Panem forever.

programme.title: Force Of Execution
programme.desc: Seagal stars as mob kingpin Mr. Alexander, an old-school boss who rules his criminal empire with both nobility and brutality. For a simple prison hit, he sends his best enforcer and protégé Roman Hurs.

programme.title: Terminator 2: Judgment Day
programme.desc: Nearly 10 years have passed since Sarah Connor was targeted for termination by a cyborg from the future. Now her son, John, the future leader of the resistance, is the target for a newer, more deadly.

programme.title: Bumblebee
programme.desc: On the run in the year 1987, Bumblebee finds refuge in a junkyard in a small Californian beach town. Charlie, on the cusp of turning 18 and trying to find her place in the world, discovers Bumblebee, battle-scarred and broken. When Charlie revives him, she quickly learns this is no ordinary yellow VW bug.

programme.title: G.I. Joe: Retaliation
programme.desc: Framed for crimes against the country, the G.I. Joe team is terminated by Presidential order. This forces the G.I. Joes into not only fighting their mortal enemy Cobra; they are forced to contend with threats from within the government that jeopardize their very existence.

programme.title: Mad Max: Fury Road
programme.desc: An apocalyptic story set in the furthest reaches of our planet, in a stark desert landscape where humanity is broken, and most everyone is crazed fighting for the necessities of life. Within this world exist two rebels on the run who just might be able to restore order.

programme.title: Kung Fu Yoga
programme.desc: Two professors team up to locate a lost treasure and embark on an adventure that takes them from a Tibetan ice cave to Dubai, and to a mountain temple in India.

programme.title: John Wick: Chapter 4
programme.desc: With the price on his head ever increasing, John Wick uncovers a path to defeating The High Table. But before he can earn his freedom, Wick must face off against a new enemy with powerful alliances across the globe and forces that turn old friends into foes.

programme.title: Godzilla
programme.desc: Ford Brody, a Navy bomb expert, has just reunited with his family in San Francisco when he is forced to go to Japan to help his estranged father, Joe. Soon, both men are swept up in an escalating crisis when Godzilla, King of the Monsters, arises from the sea to combat malevolent adversaries that threaten the survival of humanity. The creatures leave colossal destruction in their wake, as they make their way toward their final battleground: San Francisco.

programme.title: The Suicide Squad
programme.desc: Supervillains Harley Quinn, Bloodsport, Peacemaker and a collection of nutty cons at Belle Reve prison join the super-secret, super-shady Task Force X as they are dropped off at the remote, enemy-infused island of Corto Maltese.

programme.title: The Gold Rush
programme.desc: A lone prospector ventures into Alaska looking for gold. He gets mixed up with some burly characters and falls in love with the beautiful Georgia. He tries to win her heart with his singular charm.

programme.title: Reasonable Doubt
programme.desc: When up-and-coming District Attorney Mitch Brockden commits a fatal hit-and-run, he feels compelled to throw the case against the accused criminal who was found with the body and blamed for the crime. Following the trial, Mitch's worst fears come true when he realizes that he acquitted a guilty man, and he soon finds himself on the hunt for the killer before more victims pile up.

programme.title: IT CHAPTER TWO
programme.desc: 27 years after he was defeated, Pennywise is back to terrorize the town of Derry. Now adults, the Losers come back to destroy him once and for all.

programme.title: JUSTICE LEAGUE: CRISIS ON INFINITE EARTHS - PART ONE
